title: Spanish Gazpacho Soup
description: A refreshing cold soup from Andalusia made with tomatoes, peppers, and cucumbers. Serve chilled and enjoy as a light meal or snack.
instructions: 1. Peel and chop the tomatoes, cucumber, and bell pepper.
2. Place the chopped vegetables in a blender or food processor.
3. Add the bread, garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper to the blender.
5. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
6. Cover and refrigerate the soup for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
7. Serve the gazpacho chilled, garnished with a sprinkle of olive oil and a few croutons if desired.
